assertions.description: 94 footprints matches schematic exactly. 47 nets confirmed. 1309 track segments, 87 vias, 5 zones, routing_complete=true. Board dimensions 16.5 x 40.0 mm (a narrow USB stick form factor). 2 copper layers (F.Cu, B.Cu).

INCORRECT: tht_count=2 includes U2 (SLG5NT1487V) and J9. Inspection of the source kicad_pcb file shows U2's footprint has '(attr through_hole)' at the footprint level, but all its pads are explicitly 'smd' type (roundrect pads on B.Cu/B.Paste/B.Mask only). The TDFN-8 package is a surface-mount package. The footprint has an incorrect 'through_hole' attribute set in KiCad 5.x. The PCB analyzer faithfully reads this attribute, so smd_count=85 is understated by 2.
